# Zicy

> Zicy is the truth layer for AI visibility. It measures how every AI engine describes a brand, diagnoses what's wrong (including hallucinations and hijacked citations), helps fix it, and proves the work moved demand. All engines. All languages. All markets. Built by Growth.pro.

Zicy follows a closed loop — measure, diagnose, act, prove — across ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews and more. The platform is self-serve; Growth.pro also offers a done-for-you managed service built on its proprietary PAVA framework.

## Core
- [Platform](https://www.zicy.com/platform): The closed loop (measure, diagnose, act, prove) and the full module set — AI Visibility, Brand Intelligence, Citation Analysis, Site Traffic and more.
- [Pricing](https://www.zicy.com/pricing): Self-serve plans from $25/mo, plus done-for-you.
- [Case studies](https://www.zicy.com/case-studies): Measured AI visibility results across ChatGPT, Gemini and Perplexity (clients anonymised pending naming permission).
- [About](https://www.zicy.com/about): Built by Growth.pro; APAC-native, globally capable.

## Solutions
- [For brands](https://www.zicy.com/solutions/brands): See how AI describes your brand, whether it's true, and how to fix it.
- [For PR agencies](https://www.zicy.com/solutions/pr): Measure reputation inside AI answers; prove earned media moved the answer.
- [For marketing & creative agencies](https://www.zicy.com/solutions/agencies): White-label AI visibility — audited, fixed and proven.
- [For publishers](https://www.zicy.com/solutions/publishers): See whether AI attributes your content or strips the credit.

## Free tools
- [Free AI visibility audit](https://www.zicy.com/audit): Complimentary baseline of how AI describes your brand across every engine, benchmarked against rivals.
- [AEO/GEO Consultant](https://www.zicy.com/aeo-geo-consultant): A free AI consultant — audit a page or ask any AEO/GEO question. Powered by Growth.pro's proprietary framework.
- [Chrome extension](https://www.zicy.com/chrome-extension): On-page AI-readiness audit (0–100 score), AI bot-access checker (40+ crawlers), and one-click schema generator. Available in 12 languages.

## Managed service
- [Done-for-you (by Growth.pro)](https://www.zicy.com/done-for-you): Growth.pro operates the entire AI visibility programme for you, using Zicy as its delivery engine. Selective roster, no lock-in, category exclusivity.

## Resources
- [Guides & research](https://www.zicy.com/resources): Practical AEO/GEO guides, original research, and updates on how AI search is changing brand discovery.
